![](https://3650capital.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/Justins-Photo-scaled.jpg)
# FROM DAY 1  
TO DAY 3650
## AND EVERY DAY IN BETWEEN
3650 Capital, formerly 3650 REIT, is dedicated to long-term, value-added relationships. We stand by our borrowers and partners for the life of their projects and business plans from origination to execution through asset management and exit.
[ Learn More  ](https://3650capital.com/about-us/)
FROM DAY 1  
TO DAY 3650
####  AND EVERY DAY IN BETWEEN
3650 Capital, formerly 3650 REIT, is dedicated to long-term, value-added relationships. We stand by our borrowers and partners for the life of their projects and business plans from origination to execution through asset management and exit.
[ Learn More  ](https://3650capital.com/about-us/)
##  A BETTER EXPERIENCE
Hear from our founders about 3650’s relationship and service-based approach. It is our key driver for customer-centric outcomes that can support borrowers and sponsors in their desires to grow cash flow and the value of their property.
######  **OUR LENDING PLATFORM**
##  END-TO-END CAPABILITIES
Our vertically-integrated platform combines sourcing, underwriting, closing and servicing to create a seamless internal process. We maintain strategic control over every loan we make for its entire lifecycle.
The 3650 platform seeks to consistently yield improved outcomes for borrowers. 
[ Learn More  ](https://3650capital.com/debt/)
######  **OUR LENDING PLATFORM**
##  END-TO-END CAPABILITIES
Our vertically-integrated platform combines sourcing, underwriting, closing and servicing to create a seamless internal process. We maintain strategic control over every loan we make for its entire lifecycle.
The 3650 platform seeks to consistently yield improved outcomes for borrowers. 
[ Learn More ](https://3650capital.com/debt/)
######  **PRODUCTS & SERVICES**
##  FULL CYCLE SOLUTIONS
We offer capital solutions across stable cash flow for opportunistic business plans – for both debt and equity for both the short and long term.
Every loan and sponsor relationship is supported by our in-house loan servicing and asset management, focused on responsive communication and enhanced decision-making.
######  **FEATURED TRANSACTION**
##  CENTER AT MIAMI GARDENS
[ View More  ](https://3650capital.com/featured-transactions/)
####  STABLE CASH FLOW LENDING
Our long-term fixed-rate lending program mirrors the service package of traditional portfolio lenders, while delivering terms on par with capital markets lenders. It is an alternative to the service structure of CMBS conduit lenders.
[ Learn More  ](https://3650capital.com/debt/#stable-cash-flow-lending)
####  REAL ESTATE CREDIT SOLUTIONS
We specialize in real estate credit solutions for a variety of sophisticated sponsors – each seeking timely and creative capital solutions in opportunistic acquisition, development, repositioning or refinancing transactions.
[ Learn More  ](https://3650capital.com/debt/#bridge-event-driven-lending)
####  TRANSITIONAL LENDING
We provide bespoke, floating-rate financing solutions for borrowers taking out construction financing, pursuing repositioning, or otherwise executing value-add business plans with a clear path to stabilization.
[ LEARN MORE  ](https://3650capital.com/debt/#transitional)
####  SPECIAL SITUATIONS
We provide equity and structured capital solutions to lenders, borrowers, and sponsors for broken capital structures, loan purchases, value-add business plans on well positioned CRE projects across North America and asset classes.
[ LEARN MORE  ](https://3650capital.com/debt/#special)
##  RECENT NEWS

# About Us
About Us[Evan](https://3650capital.com/author/evan/ "Posts by Evan")2026-02-10T16:47:48+00:00
#  ABOUT US
#  FROM INITIAL   
CAPITALIZATION  
TO MATURITY
####  AND BACK AGAIN
We source, structure, service and safeguard the loan for 3650 days.
######  [**WHO WE ARE**](https://3650capital.com/about-us/#who-we-are) [**WHY US**](https://3650capital.com/about-us/#why-us) [**OUR ETHOS**](https://3650capital.com/about-us/#our-ethos) [**OUR CULTURE**](https://3650capital.com/about-us/#our-culture) [**OUR EXPERTISE**](https://3650capital.com/about-us/#our-expertise) [**OUR LEADERSHIP TEAM**](https://3650capital.com/about-us/#our-team)
#  FROM INITIAL   
CAPITALIZATION  
TO MATURITY
####  AND BACK AGAIN
We source, structure, service and safeguard the loan for 3650 days.
######  **WHO WE ARE**
##  BEYOND CAPITAL
3650 Capital is a CRE lending and loan servicing firm, led by a team of recognized industry leaders. We originate and service both short- and long-term commercial real estate loans.
Capital is just the beginning of what we offer. Our true value is in our ability to hold a loan on our balance sheet through maturity. By maintaining internal control of processes, we can consistently align incentive structures to benefit all participants in the transaction.
Leveraging our customer-centric business model, we are working to become one of the industry’s most trusted, responsive and efficient providers of capital.
######  **WHY US**
##  THE 3650 DIFFERENCE
3650 Capital is not a company who stops at the closing of the transaction. We continue on, responsively and effectively attending to customers’ financial demands. Relationships matter to us. They are the foundation of our business model and our competitive edge.
####  OUR COMPANY PILLARS
![](https://3650capital.com/about-us/)
######  **RELATIONSHIPS**
We place clients at the forefront of our business, providing tailored finance solutions, reliable performance and high-touch service throughout the entire lifecycle of a transaction.
![](https://3650capital.com/about-us/)
######  **MODEL**
All relationship, servicing and loan management functions are consolidated internally, enabling us to control material decision-making at every stage.
![](https://3650capital.com/about-us/)
######  **EXPERTISE**
We are a team of service professionals, armed with several decades of experience in CRE lending, equity, capital markets, mortgage banking and loan servicing.
####  LIMITLESS POTENTIAL
We continually work to help borrowers and sponsors maximize property cash flow and value underlying our loan assets.
[ See Our Platform ](https://3650capital.com/debt/)
######  **OUR ETHOS**
##  ONE LENDER. WHOLLY COMMITTED.
Our business philosophy and operating model hinge on the strength of our relationships. The connection between lenders, partners, and borrowers is bolstered by responsiveness, effectiveness and transparency throughout the organization. As it grows, each expert develops an intimate knowledge of a borrower’s asset and transaction through the knowledge of each asset and transaction.
######  **OUR CULTURE**
##  HIGHER STANDARDS
The leaders of 3650 Capital facilitate a culture of high expectation – with respect to our principles, our processes and most importantly, our services. The framework of our operations sets forth a predictable process with the aim of creating positive results. As property and market conditions evolve, we are prepared to respond efficiently and effectively.
By establishing relationships around reliable structures, we seek to foster ongoing business from professional property owners. In essence, we target a cycle between asset management, loan servicing and origination.
######  **OUR CULTURE**
##  HIGHER STANDARDS
The leaders of 3650 Capital facilitate a culture of high expectation – with respect to our principles, our processes and most importantly, our services. The framework of our operations sets forth a predictable process with the aim of creating positive results. As property and market conditions evolve, we are prepared to respond efficiently and effectively.
By establishing relationships around reliable structures, we seek to foster ongoing business from professional property owners. In essence, we target a cycle between asset management, loan servicing and origination.
######  **OUR LEADERSHIP TEAM**
##  AN ESTABLISHED INDUSTRY FORCE
3650 Capital boasts a highly skilled team of lifetime professionals with cross-discipline experience in the CRE industry and major regional markets across the US. Our capabilities span CRE debt and equity sectors, including ground-up development, re-positioning, leasing and property management.
Our experience and industry insight inform our differentiated approach. We have an understanding of the borrower’s perspective – what they need and what they’re looking to gain. It’s how we help borrowers navigate the ever-changing market and devise optimal credit solutions. Every loan structure is tailored to match the property business plan and enhance lasting value.

# Daniel Antonelli
Daniel Antonelli[Evan](https://3650capital.com/author/evan/ "Posts by Evan")2024-10-18T13:14:09+00:00
### Project Description
##  DANIEL ANTONELLI
######  **Managing Director - Head of Asset Management & Loan Servicing **
Mr. Antonelli oversees the Miami-based Commercial Loan Servicing and Asset Management platforms for 3650 Capital and its affiliate Grass River Property and brings 15 years of commercial real estate, loan asset management and loan servicing experience. Mr. Antonelli has been with the firm since 2014 and during his tenure he and his team have managed over $17.5 billion in commercial real estate loans and real estate investments across all geographies and asset types, with diverse and complex capital and investment structures and related operational and administration responsibilities.
Prior to 3650, Dan was a Senior Portfolio Manager for LNR Partners, where he directed a team of asset managers and analysts and was responsible for the day-to-day management and strategy of multiple whole loan and securitized CMBS loan portfolios with total assets under management in excess of $5 billion. Previously, Mr. Antonelli also oversaw acquisitions, dispositions and asset management for a Miami-based private-equity firm that acquired and managed over $1.5 billion in commercial real estate assets.

# Malay Bansal
Malay Bansal[Evan](https://3650capital.com/author/evan/ "Posts by Evan")2025-04-10T04:21:08+00:00
### Project Description
##  MALAY BANSAL
######  **Managing Partner, Head of Trading & Capital Markets**
Mr. Bansal is 3650 Capital's Head of Trading. Mr. Bansal brings over 30 years of broad markets experience in commercial real estate, capital markets, and technology. Roles he has held include head of trading, head of securitization/banking, head of CRE warehouse financing, head of structuring, and head of portfolio management and advisory.
Prior to 3650 Capital, Malay was a Senior Portfolio Manager & Head of Capital Markets for CMBS Lending at BNY Mellon Investment Management. Prior to BNYM, Malay was a Senior Director in the Multifamily division of Freddie Mac, where he oversaw a 12-person loan pricing and securitization structuring group.
Previously, as Managing Director at NewOak Capital, Malay did advisory, underwriting/valuation of real estate loan and bond portfolios. Prior to NewOak, Malay was at Merrill Lynch for 15 years where he was CMBS Lead Securitization Banker and Head of Pricing & Structuring for US & Canada for majority of the time, after working on Options and CMO desks, and before being given responsibility to build a new CRE warehouse financing and securitization business in 2006. Prior to Merrill, Malay worked on design and development of large networked database systems.
Malay holds an MBA from Rutgers University, and MS in Economics & BS in Electronics Engineering from BITS, Pilani.

# Malay Bansal
Malay BansalEvan⟨20⟩2025-04-10T04:21:08+00:00
### Project Description
##  MALAY BANSAL
######  **Managing Partner, Head of Trading & Capital Markets**
Mr. Bansal is 3650 Capital's Head of Trading. Mr. Bansal brings over 30 years of broad markets experience in commercial real estate, capital markets, and technology. Roles he has held include head of trading, head of securitization/banking, head of CRE warehouse financing, head of structuring, and head of portfolio management and advisory.
Prior to 3650 Capital, Malay was a Senior Portfolio Manager & Head of Capital Markets for CMBS Lending at BNY Mellon Investment Management. Prior to BNYM, Malay was a Senior Director in the Multifamily division of Freddie Mac, where he oversaw a 12-person loan pricing and securitization structuring group.
Previously, as Managing Director at NewOak Capital, Malay did advisory, underwriting/valuation of real estate loan and bond portfolios. Prior to NewOak, Malay was at Merrill Lynch for 15 years where he was CMBS Lead Securitization Banker and Head of Pricing & Structuring for US & Canada for majority of the time, after working on Options and CMO desks, and before being given responsibility to build a new CRE warehouse financing and securitization business in 2006. Prior to Merrill, Malay worked on design and development of large networked database systems.
Malay holds an MBA from Rutgers University, and MS in Economics & BS in Electronics Engineering from BITS, Pilani.

# Toby Cobb
Toby Cobb[Evan](https://3650capital.com/author/evan/ "Posts by Evan")2024-10-14T03:01:52+00:00
### Project Description
##  TOBY COBB
######  **Managing Partner, Co-Founder**
Toby Cobb, Co-Founder and Managing Partner of 3650 Capital, has 30 years of experience in commercial real estate and finance. In 2013, Mr. Cobb and his partner Justin Kennedy co-founded 3650 Capital's CRE equity and development affiliate, Grass River Property, a leading South Florida developer with approximately 2 million square feet of real estate owned. 
Prior to Grass River, Mr. Cobb and Mr. Kennedy were Co-CEOs leading the restructuring, management and eventual sale of LNR Property, LLC. Mr. Cobb built and led LNR’s loan origination platform and led its primary loan servicing and distressed assets servicing platforms, which are among the largest in both the U.S. and Europe. Prior to LNR, Mr. Cobb was Managing Director and Co-Head of US Commercial Real Estate at Deutsche Bank, leading fixed rate and GSE originations and its loan servicing platform. While at Deutsche Bank Mr. Cobb served on The Community Reinvestment Act (CRA) Bank Board. Prior to Deutsche Bank, Mr. Cobb played leading roles in CRE investment banking groups at DLJ and Citicorp Securities. 
Mr. Cobb holds a B.S. in Economics and Finance from Southern Methodist University and an M.B.A. in Finance and International Business from New York University. He is the Chairman, Emeritus and Board Member of the Master of Real Estate Development and Urbanism program at the University of Miami, a Trustee of the Urban Land Association (ULI), and is on the President’s Council of the Real Estate Roundtable. Mr. Cobb is a long-standing Board Member of the Commercial Real Estate Finance Council and the chair of the membership committee. He is a Board Member of The Waterside School and Baptist Health South Florida, and holds an advisory role with the NYU Schack Institute of Real Estate.

# Toby Cobb
Toby CobbEvan⟨20⟩2024-10-14T03:01:52+00:00
### Project Description
##  TOBY COBB
######  **Managing Partner, Co-Founder**
Toby Cobb, Co-Founder and Managing Partner of 3650 Capital, has 30 years of experience in commercial real estate and finance. In 2013, Mr. Cobb and his partner Justin Kennedy co-founded 3650 Capital's CRE equity and development affiliate, Grass River Property, a leading South Florida developer with approximately 2 million square feet of real estate owned. 
Prior to Grass River, Mr. Cobb and Mr. Kennedy were Co-CEOs leading the restructuring, management and eventual sale of LNR Property, LLC. Mr. Cobb built and led LNR’s loan origination platform and led its primary loan servicing and distressed assets servicing platforms, which are among the largest in both the U.S. and Europe. Prior to LNR, Mr. Cobb was Managing Director and Co-Head of US Commercial Real Estate at Deutsche Bank, leading fixed rate and GSE originations and its loan servicing platform. While at Deutsche Bank Mr. Cobb served on The Community Reinvestment Act (CRA) Bank Board. Prior to Deutsche Bank, Mr. Cobb played leading roles in CRE investment banking groups at DLJ and Citicorp Securities. 
Mr. Cobb holds a B.S. in Economics and Finance from Southern Methodist University and an M.B.A. in Finance and International Business from New York University. He is the Chairman, Emeritus and Board Member of the Master of Real Estate Development and Urbanism program at the University of Miami, a Trustee of the Urban Land Association (ULI), and is on the President’s Council of the Real Estate Roundtable. Mr. Cobb is a long-standing Board Member of the Commercial Real Estate Finance Council and the chair of the membership committee. He is a Board Member of The Waterside School and Baptist Health South Florida, and holds an advisory role with the NYU Schack Institute of Real Estate.

# Ken Dickey
Ken Dickey[Evan](https://3650capital.com/author/evan/ "Posts by Evan")2024-10-14T03:02:41+00:00
### Project Description
##  KEN DICKEY
######  **Managing Partner, Head of Fixed Rate Lending**
Mr. Dickey has 26 years of CRE lending and relationship management experience and leads the 3650 Capital fixed rate originations platform. Previously, Mr. Dickey was Managing Director and led origination for the CRE lending platform at The Bank of New York Mellon (“BONY”). Prior to BONY, Mr. Dickey served as President of Deutsche Bank Mortgage Capital where he worked together with Kennedy and Cobb for more than 10 years. 
During his tenure at Deutsche Bank, its fixed rate lending operations originated and distributed over 900 loans with principal balance over $12 billion. Prior to Deutsche Bank, Mr. Dickey served as Head of Origination for the Real Estate Capital Markets Group of First Union National Bank. Prior to First Union National Bank, Mr. Dickey played a lead origination role at DLJ. 
Mr. Dickey holds a B.A. in International Affairs from Lewis and Clark College.

##  Julia Ferrier
######  **Senior Associate**
Julia Ferrier is a Senior Associate in the Investment Management division of 3650 Capital. Julia has been with 3650 since 2021.
She previously worked in Investment Banking at Citi, working on a range of transactions in the Alternative Energy sector.
Julia holds a B.S. in Applied Economics and Management from Cornell University.

# Michael Fleischer
Michael Fleischer[Evan](https://3650capital.com/author/evan/ "Posts by Evan")2025-03-06T21:56:48+00:00
### Project Description
##  MICHAEL FLEISCHER
######  **Deputy Chief Investment Officer & ​Head of Real Estate Credit Solutions**
Mr. Fleischer has 20 years of commercial real estate experience and leads 3650 Capital's Real Estate Credit Solutions. Previously, Mr. Fleischer was a Managing Director with RHRECS, a debt fund co-managed by Related Fund Management and HPS Investment Partners where he focused on transaction origination, structuring, asset management and portfolio finance. 
Prior to Related, Mr. Fleischer was principal investor/lender with Canyon Capital and Links Capital Partners. Mr. Fleischer’s experience includes more than 8 years as legal counsel at the law firms of Sullivan & Cromwell and Gibson, Dunn & Crutcher. 
Mr. Fleischer holds an MBA from Columbia Business School, a JD from Columbia Law School and a BA in Economics from Columbia College. Mr. Fleischer also studied economics at Cambridge University.

# Mark Jefferis
Mark Jefferis[Evan](https://3650capital.com/author/evan/ "Posts by Evan")2024-12-21T01:27:02+00:00
### Project Description
##  MARK JEFFERIS
######  **Managing Partner, Chief Administrative Officer, and General Counsel**
Mr. Jefferis is 3650 Capital’s General Counsel and Chief Compliance Officer. Mr. Jefferis brings 16 years of commercial real estate investment, capital markets, and other legal experience to 3650 Capital. 
Prior to joining 3650 Capital, Mr. Jefferis was Counsel with Sidley Austin LLP (“Sidley”), where he advised banks, investment funds, and high net worth individuals in commercial real estate matters ranging from lending transactions (CMBS loans, bridge loans, mezzanine loans, DIP financing, construction lending), loan workouts, master and special servicing matters, preferred equity investments, secondary market transactions, and property acquisition/disposition transactions. 
Before his work at Sidley, Mr. Jefferis was a Global Finance Associate with Cadwalader, Wickersham & Taft LLP (“Cadwalader”), where he represented lenders and investors in an extensive range of CMBS origination, secondary market, and servicing matters. Before Cadwalader, Mr. Jefferis served as a judicial clerk to the Minnesota Court of Appeals. 
Mr. Jefferis holds a B.A. in English and Philosophy from the University of Oregon, a J.D. from the University of Oregon, and a LL.M. from New York University.

# Justin Kennedy
Justin Kennedy[Evan](https://3650capital.com/author/evan/ "Posts by Evan")2024-10-14T03:07:34+00:00
### Project Description
##  JUSTIN KENNEDY
######  **Managing Partner, Co-Founder**
3650 Capital Co-Founder Justin Kennedy brings 32 years of CRE experience, including finance, distressed assets and development. In 2013, Kennedy and Cobb co-founded 3650 Capital’s CRE development affiliate, Grass River Property, a leading South Florida developer and manager of mixed-use, urban-infill and transit-oriented properties. In partnership with leading institutional partners, the Grass River portfolio includes 14 development and equity investments totaling more than 1.8 million SF. 
Prior to Grass River, Kennedy and Cobb served as Co-CEOs of LNR Property LLC. Mr. Kennedy led the firm’s strategic direction and investment activities across LNR’s global CRE debt, equity and distressed assets platforms. Prior to LNR, Mr. Kennedy served 11 years at Deutsche Bank as Managing Director and Global Head of Real Estate Capital Markets. Prior to Deutsche Bank, Mr. Kennedy was Head of CMBS Trading at Goldman Sachs and a member of the firm’s Principal Investment Group. 
He spent the first eight years of his career in the real estate development business in California and Colorado. Mr. Kennedy holds an A.B. in Economics from Stanford University and an M.B.A. from UCLA.

# Peter LaPointe
Peter LaPointe[Evan](https://3650capital.com/author/evan/ "Posts by Evan")2024-10-14T03:12:09+00:00
### Project Description
##  PETER LAPOINTE
######  **Managing Partner, Chief Operating Officer**
Mr. LaPointe has 21 years of experience in CRE loan origination and servicing, development, and distressed assets acquisitions and management. In 2013, Mr. LaPointe joined Cobb and Kennedy during the formation of 3650 Capital’s affiliate, Grass River Property. 
Prior to Grass River, Mr. LaPointe served as President of LNR Archetype Financial Institution Services, a CRE debt investment and servicing division of LNR Property, LLC. Prior to LNR, Mr. LaPointe was a Managing Director at Bayview Financial, LP (“Bayview”) leading its CRE investment, lending and loan servicing businesses. Prior to Bayview, Mr. LaPointe was a senior manager with Republic Financial Corporation of Denver, Colorado, a specialty finance company sponsored by Cargill Financial Services Corporation. 
Mr. LaPointe holds a B.S. from Ithaca College and a J.D. from Roger Williams University, where he was a member of the law review.

# Michael McCabe
Michael McCabe[Evan](https://3650capital.com/author/evan/ "Posts by Evan")2024-10-14T03:14:46+00:00
### Project Description
##  Michael McCabe
######  **Director, Originations**
Mr. McCabe is a Director at 3650 Capital, responsible for the origination, structuring, and execution of lending opportunities on all property types nationwide. Mr. McCabe has over 12 years of experience in the commercial real estate investment and mortgage lending business and was part of the original 3650 fixed rate lending team launched in 2017.
Prior to joining 3650 Capital, Mr. McCabe held CRE loan origination and underwriting roles at Building and Land Technology, Five Mile Capital, and Wells Fargo Bank.
Mr. McCabe holds a B.A. in Political Science from the College of the Holy Cross in Worcester, MA.

# Andrew Parower
Andrew Parower[Evan](https://3650capital.com/author/evan/ "Posts by Evan")2025-01-03T20:44:39+00:00
### Project Description
##  ANDREW PAROWER
######  **Managing Partner, Chief Credit Officer**
Mr. Parower is responsible for analyzing lending opportunities and general loan-portfolio management. Mr. Parower brings 29 years of commercial real estate investment, capital markets, and fund management experience to 3650 Capital. Prior to 3650 REIT, Andrew was Managing Director of Marketfield Asset Management where he launched and managed a $300 million CMBS fund in 2009. 
Prior to Marketfield, Andrew spent five years managing $23 billion in domestic and European CMBS portfolios and was an integral part the CRE lending teams for AIG’s core subsidiaries, mutual funds, and investment vehicles. Prior to AIG, Andrew spent seven years at New York Life Investment Management’s CRE group working on structured credits and managing $6 billion of CMBS portfolios. 
Andrew’s earlier CRE experience includes being co-lead banker on a CRE loan origination and securitization program; property acquisitions for a pension fund advisor; and a senior team member of Chase Manhattan Bank’s Owned Real Estate Group. 
Andrew holds a B.S.B.A. in Finance and Accounting from Washington University in St. Louis, and an M.B.A. from Fordham University.

# Will Pierce
Will Pierce[Evan](https://3650capital.com/author/evan/ "Posts by Evan")2024-10-14T02:49:24+00:00
### Project Description
##  Will Pierce
######  **Director, Bridge Lending Originations**
Mr. Pierce, Director, has 7 years of commercial real estate investment experience and works within the 3650 Capital Bridge and Event Driven lending platform. In 2014, Mr. Pierce joined 3650 Capital’s CRE equity and development affiliate, Grass River Property, a leading South Florida developer with approximately 2 million sq feet of real estate owned.
Mr. Pierce holds a B.S. in Building Science from Auburn University and a master's degree in Real Estate Development + Urbanism from the University of Miami.

# Alannah Rabich
Alannah Rabich[Zoe Parower](https://3650capital.com/author/zoe/ "Posts by Zoe Parower")2024-10-14T02:50:39+00:00
### Project Description
##  Alannah Rabich
######  **Vice President**
Alannah Rabich is a Vice President at 3650 Capital where she serves the Investor Relations department. Ms. Rabich has been with 3650 Capital since 2021.
Prior to 3650, Alannah was a Senior Associate at Rialto Capital where she worked in the Asset and Portfolio Management of their rated CMBS Special Servicing division, which oversees a portfolio of more than $120 billion. Previously she was at Deloitte & Touche in their New York office servicing Private Equity clients in the Audit & Assurance practice. Alannah is a licensed CPA in New York.
Ms. Rabich holds a Masters and Bachelor’s in Accounting both from Florida Atlantic University.

# Jonathan Roth
Jonathan Roth[Evan](https://3650capital.com/author/evan/ "Posts by Evan")2024-03-18T19:39:07+00:00
### Project Description
##  JONATHAN ROTH
######  **Managing Partner, Co-Founder**
Mr. Roth, Co-Founder, brings 30 years of experience originating, structuring and servicing CRE investments. Previously, Mr. Roth served as President of Canyon Partners Real Estate LLC. During his 18-year tenure at Canyon, Mr. Roth was instrumental in the formation of several investment vehicles which collectively invested approximately $5.6 billion in over 200 transactions. 
Prior to joining Canyon, Mr. Roth was a partner specializing in complex real estate transactions at the international law firm of Loeb & Loeb. Mr. Roth has served on multiple philanthropic boards and works with several leading medical institutions, including the USC Center for Applied Molecular Medicine, UCLA Medical Center and Cedars Sinai Hospital. 
Mr. Roth currently sits on the Board of Governors for Cedars Sinai Hospital and the Advisory Board of the Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, and the Board of Advisors for the Finance and Audit Committee of the Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center Board. Mr. Roth holds a B.A. in English Literature from UCLA, and a J.D. from Loyola Law School.

# Jake Stahler
Jake Stahler[Evan](https://3650capital.com/author/evan/ "Posts by Evan")2026-01-07T15:58:05+00:00
### Project Description
##  Jake Stahler
######  **Managing Director, Co Head of Fixed Rate Lending**
Mr. Stahler has over 23 years of commercial real estate experience and is based in 3650’s New York office. He is responsible for national originations and the operations of the SCF business. Over his career, Mr. Stahler has originated over $5 billion commercial mortgage loans throughout the United States. Mr. Stahler was an original member of the fixed rate lending team at 3650. Prior to 3650, Mr. Stahler worked for the Bank of New York’s capital markets lending program, Deutsche Bank, and Gramercy Capital Corp. Mr. Stahler holds a B.A. in History from Colgate University.

images.desc: Products & Services – DebtZoe Parower2025-07-25T21:10:27+00:00 PRODUCTS & SERVICES  FROM SHORT-TERM TO LONG-TERM SOLUTIONS ACROSS ALL LOAN STRUCTURES, ACROSS THE PROPERTY LIFE CYCLEWe are there with a diverse range of financing products and services.  LOAN SERVICING BRIDGE & EVENT LENDING STABLE CASH FLOW LENDING FEATURED TRANSACTIONS   FROM SHORT-TERM TO LONG-TERM SOLUTIONS ACROSS ALL LOAN STRUCTURES, ACROSS THE PROPERTY LIFE CYCLEWe are there with a diverse range of financing products and services. OPERATING PLATFORM VERTICAL INTEGRATIONOne of 3650 Capital's key differentiators is our operating platform. It was built on a vertically integrated structure, empowering our team to conduct services and material credit decisions internally. We do not simply source opportunities. We work with sponsors to devise the right plan for achieving beneficial results for all participants.  Keeping the full process in-house provides a value proposition. It helps us streamline borrower communication and the tactical execution of our loan and equity investment strategy. In a long-term sense, it facilitates better borrower outcomes and strong relationships with high-quality sponsors. OPERATING PLATFORM VERTICAL INTEGRATIONOne of 3650 Capital's key differentiators is our operating platform. It was built on a vertically integrated structure, empowering our team to conduct services and material credit decisions internally. We do not simply source opportunities. We work with sponsors to devise the right plan for achieving beneficial results for all participants.  Keeping the full process in-house provides a value proposition. It helps us streamline borrower communication and the tactical execution of our loan and equity investment strategy. In a long-term sense, it facilitates better borrower outcomes and strong relationships with high-quality sponsors. OVERVIEW LOAN SERVICINGOur loan servicing team is backed by decades of experience in commercial real estate, including finance, distressed assets and development. It lends us the business acumen to creatively and individually structure loans to meet the business objectives of borrowers – whether they require short- or long-term finance solutions. Driven by our customer-centric platform, we are committed to servicing borrowers in the way they deserve. We aim to deliver market leading levels of responsiveness and transparency through every stage of the loan process. OPERATING PLATFORM VERTICAL INTEGRATIONOne of 3650 Capital's key differentiators is our operating platform. It was built on a vertically integrated structure, empowering our team to conduct services and material credit decisions internally. We do not simply source opportunities. We work with sponsors to devise the right plan for achieving beneficial results for all participants.  Keeping the full process in-house provides a value proposition. It helps us streamline borrower communication and the tactical execution of our loan and equity investment strategy. In a long-term sense, it facilitates better borrower outcomes and strong relationships with high-quality sponsors. OVERVIEW LOAN SERVICINGOur loan servicing team is backed by decades of experience in commercial real estate, including finance, distressed assets and development. It lends us the business acumen to creatively and individually structure loans to meet the business objectives of borrowers – whether they require short- or long-term finance solutions. Driven by our customer-centric platform, we are committed to servicing borrowers in the way they deserve. We aim to deliver market leading levels of responsiveness and transparency through every stage of the loan process. OPERATING PLATFORM VERTICAL INTEGRATIONOne of 3650 Capital's key differentiators is our operating platform. It was built on a vertically integrated structure, empowering our team to conduct services and material credit decisions internally. We do not simply source opportunities. We work with sponsors to devise the right plan for achieving beneficial results for all participants.  Keeping the full process in-house provides a value proposition. It helps us streamline borrower communication and the tactical execution of our loan and equity investment strategy. In a long-term sense, it facilitates better borrower outcomes and strong relationships with high-quality sponsors. OVERVIEW LOAN SERVICINGOur loan servicing team is backed by decades of experience in commercial real estate, including finance, distressed assets and development. It lends us the business acumen to creatively and individually structure loans to meet the business objectives of borrowers – whether they require short- or long-term finance solutions. Driven by our customer-centric platform, we are committed to servicing borrowers in the way they deserve. We aim to deliver market leading levels of responsiveness and transparency through every stage of the loan process. OPERATING PLATFORM VERTICAL INTEGRATIONOne of 3650 Capital's key differentiators is our operating platform. It was built on a vertically integrated structure, empowering our team to conduct services and material credit decisions internally. We do not simply source opportunities. We work with sponsors to devise the right plan for achieving beneficial results for all participants.  Keeping the full process in-house provides a value proposition. It helps us streamline borrower communication and the tactical execution of our loan and equity investment strategy. In a long-term sense, it facilitates better borrower outcomes and strong relationships with high-quality sponsors. OVERVIEW LOAN SERVICINGOur loan servicing team is backed by decades of experience in commercial real estate, including finance, distressed assets and development. It lends us the business acumen to creatively and individually structure loans to meet the business objectives of borrowers – whether they require short- or long-term finance solutions. Driven by our customer-centric platform, we are committed to servicing borrowers in the way they deserve. We aim to deliver market leading levels of responsiveness and transparency through every stage of the loan process. OVERVIEW REAL ESTATE CREDIT SOLUTIONSWe specialize in real estate credit solutions for borrowers pursuing ground-up construction, acquisitions, repositionings, recapitalizations, or the restructuring of partnerships. Through our lending strategy, we originate senior and mezzanine loans and preferred equity commercial real estate investments.   OVERVIEW REAL ESTATE CREDIT SOLUTIONSWe specialize in real estate credit solutions for borrowers pursuing ground-up construction, acquisitions, repositionings, recapitalizations, or the restructuring of partnerships. Through our lending strategy, we originate senior and mezzanine loans and preferred equity commercial real estate investments.  OUR DIFFERENTIATED APPROACH STRATEGIC SHORT-TERM STRUCTURING    DIRECT ORIGINATION Initiated through relationships with intermediaries and borrowers nationwide. OPERATING PLATFORM VERTICAL INTEGRATIONOne of 3650 Capital's key differentiators is our operating platform. It was built on a vertically integrated structure, empowering our team to conduct services and material credit decisions internally. We do not simply source opportunities. We work with sponsors to devise the right plan for achieving beneficial results for all participants.  Keeping the full process in-house provides a value proposition. It helps us streamline borrower communication and the tactical execution of our loan and equity investment strategy. In a long-term sense, it facilitates better borrower outcomes and strong relationships with high-quality sponsors. OVERVIEW LOAN SERVICINGOur loan servicing team is backed by decades of experience in commercial real estate, including finance, distressed assets and development. It lends us the business acumen to creatively and individually structure loans to meet the business objectives of borrowers – whether they require short- or long-term finance solutions. Driven by our customer-centric platform, we are committed to servicing borrowers in the way they deserve. We aim to deliver market leading levels of responsiveness and transparency through every stage of the loan process. OVERVIEW REAL ESTATE CREDIT SOLUTIONSWe specialize in real estate credit solutions for borrowers pursuing ground-up construction, acquisitions, repositionings, recapitalizations, or the restructuring of partnerships. Through our lending strategy, we originate senior and mezzanine loans and preferred equity commercial real estate investments.   OVERVIEW REAL ESTATE CREDIT SOLUTIONSWe specialize in real estate credit solutions for borrowers pursuing ground-up construction, acquisitions, repositionings, recapitalizations, or the restructuring of partnerships. Through our lending strategy, we originate senior and mezzanine loans and preferred equity commercial real estate investments.  OUR DIFFERENTIATED APPROACH STRATEGIC SHORT-TERM STRUCTURING    DIRECT ORIGINATION Initiated through relationships with intermediaries and borrowers nationwide. # Products & Services – Debt
Products & Services – Debt[Zoe Parower](https://3650capital.com/author/zoe/ "Posts by Zoe Parower")2025-07-25T21:10:27+00:00
#  PRODUCTS & SERVICES
#  FROM SHORT-TERM  
TO LONG-TERM  
SOLUTIONS
####  ACROSS ALL LOAN STRUCTURES, ACROSS THE PROPERTY LIFE CYCLE
We are there with a diverse range of financing products and services.
######  [**LOAN SERVICING**](https://3650capital.com/debt/#loan-servicing) [**BRIDGE & EVENT LENDING**](https://3650capital.com/debt/#bridged-event-lending) [**STABLE CASH FLOW LENDING**](https://3650capital.com/debt/#ten-year-fixed) [**FEATURED TRANSACTIONS**](https://3650capital.com/debt/#featured-transactions)
#  FROM SHORT-TERM  
TO LONG-TERM  
SOLUTIONS
####  ACROSS ALL LOAN STRUCTURES, ACROSS THE PROPERTY LIFE CYCLE
We are there with a diverse range of financing products and services.
######  **OPERATING PLATFORM**
##  VERTICAL INTEGRATION
One of 3650 Capital's key differentiators is our operating platform. It was built on a vertically integrated structure, empowering our team to conduct services and material credit decisions internally. We do not simply source opportunities. We work with sponsors to devise the right plan for achieving beneficial results for all participants. 
Keeping the full process in-house provides a value proposition. It helps us streamline borrower communication and the tactical execution of our loan and equity investment strategy. In a long-term sense, it facilitates better borrower outcomes and strong relationships with high-quality sponsors.
######  **OVERVIEW**
##  LOAN SERVICING
Our loan servicing team is backed by decades of experience in commercial real estate, including finance, distressed assets and development. It lends us the business acumen to creatively and individually structure loans to meet the business objectives of borrowers – whether they require short- or long-term finance solutions.
Driven by our customer-centric platform, we are committed to servicing borrowers in the way they deserve. We aim to deliver market leading levels of responsiveness and transparency through every stage of the loan process.
######  **OVERVIEW**
##  REAL ESTATE CREDIT SOLUTIONS
We specialize in real estate credit solutions for borrowers pursuing ground-up construction, acquisitions, repositionings, recapitalizations, or the restructuring of partnerships.
Through our lending strategy, we originate senior and mezzanine loans and preferred equity commercial real estate investments. 
######  **OVERVIEW**
##  REAL ESTATE CREDIT SOLUTIONS
We specialize in real estate credit solutions for borrowers pursuing ground-up construction, acquisitions, repositionings, recapitalizations, or the restructuring of partnerships.
Through our lending strategy, we originate senior and mezzanine loans and preferred equity commercial real estate investments. 
######  **OUR DIFFERENTIATED APPROACH**
##  STRATEGIC SHORT-TERM STRUCTURING

Efficient and responsive servicing at each stage of the process.
![](https://3650capital.com/debt/)

Vigilant communication and monitoring of bridge and event-driven loans.

#  FROM SHORT-TERM

SOLUTIONS
####  ACROSS ALL LOAN STRUCTURES, ACROSS THE PROPERTY LIFE CYCLE
We are there with a diverse range of financing products and services.
######  **OPERATING PLATFORM**
##  VERTICAL INTEGRATION
One of 3650 Capital's key differentiators is our operating platform. It was built on a vertically integrated structure, empowering our team to conduct services and material credit decisions internally. We do not simply source opportunities. We work with sponsors to devise the right plan for achieving beneficial results for all participants. 
Keeping the full process in-house provides a value proposition. It helps us streamline borrower communication and the tactical execution of our loan and equity investment strategy. In a long-term sense, it facilitates better borrower outcomes and strong relationships with high-quality sponsors.
######  **OVERVIEW**
##  LOAN SERVICING
Our loan servicing team is backed by decades of experience in commercial real estate, including finance, distressed assets and development. It lends us the business acumen to creatively and individually structure loans to meet the business objectives of borrowers – whether they require short- or long-term finance solutions.
Driven by our customer-centric platform, we are committed to servicing borrowers in the way they deserve. We aim to deliver market leading levels of responsiveness and transparency through every stage of the loan process.
######  **OVERVIEW**
##  REAL ESTATE CREDIT SOLUTIONS
We specialize in real estate credit solutions for borrowers pursuing ground-up construction, acquisitions, repositionings, recapitalizations, or the restructuring of partnerships.
Through our lending strategy, we originate senior and mezzanine loans and preferred equity commercial real estate investments. 
######  **OVERVIEW**
##  REAL ESTATE CREDIT SOLUTIONS
We specialize in real estate credit solutions for borrowers pursuing ground-up construction, acquisitions, repositionings, recapitalizations, or the restructuring of partnerships.
Through our lending strategy, we originate senior and mezzanine loans and preferred equity commercial real estate investments.

# Platform
Platform[Evan](https://3650capital.com/author/evan/ "Posts by Evan")2022-10-31T23:05:29+00:00
#  PLATFORM
#  FROM PRE-CREDIT  
TO POST-CLOSING.
####  AND ONE APPROVAL TO THE NEXT.
We’re there through every loan decision to ensure mutually beneficial outcomes for all lending transaction participants.
######  [**OPERATING PLATFORM**](https://3650capital.com/platform/#operating-platform) [**DUAL LENDING STRATEGY**](https://3650capital.com/platform/#dual-lending)
#  FROM PRE-CREDIT  
TO POST-CLOSING.
####  AND ONE APPROVAL TO THE NEXT.
We’re there through every loan decision to ensure mutually beneficial outcomes for all lending transaction participants.
######  **OPERATING PLATFORM**
##  VERTICAL INTEGRATION.
One of 3650 REIT’s key differentiators is our operating platform. It was built on a vertically integrated structure, empowering our team to conduct loan services and material credit decisions internally. We don’t simply source loans. We work with sponsors to devise the right plan for achieving beneficial results for all participants. 
Keeping the full process in-house provides a value proposition. It helps us streamline borrower communication and the tactical execution of our loan strategy. In a long-term sense, it facilitates better borrower outcomes and strong relationships with high-quality sponsors.
######  **DUAL LENDING STRATEGY**
##  CREATIVE LOAN STRUCTURES.
The strategic agility of 3650 REIT rests on our dual first-lien debt strategy. We take a hands-on approach to both short- and long-term loans. That means managing and servicing loans at every stage.
Because of this, we are better able to responsibly and responsively meet the needs of a wide range of borrowers – from those with stabilized properties to those pursuing acquisitions, developments, repositionings and refinancings.
Our strategy puts us in a powerful industry position.
[ Bridge & Event  ](https://3650capital.com/products-services/#bridge-event-lending)
[ Stable Cash Flow  ](https://3650capital.com/products-services/#ten-year-fixed)

# Privacy Policy
Privacy Policy[Evan](https://3650capital.com/author/evan/ "Posts by Evan")2022-12-12T21:45:05+00:00
### PRIVACY POLICY
Effective Date: November 15, 2022
### SCOPE
This Privacy Policy (“Policy”) describes how 3650 REIT Loan Origination LLC (“3650”) treats personal information on our websites where the Policy is located (the “Platform”). This Privacy Policy applies only to 3650 and not to any affiliates, parents, or subsidiaries of 3650.
This Platform is operated in the United States and intended for use by individuals who are located in the United States.
### TYPES OF INFORMATION WE COLLECT
We collect information from you and about you. Here are some examples of the information we may collect:
  * **Contact Information.** For example, we may collect your name, mailing address, telephone number and email address. We may also collect your mobile phone number.
  * **Information You Submit.** We may collect information when you send us a message through the “Contact Us” page, or fill out a loan origination form on our Platform.
  * **Device Information.** For example, we may collect the type of device you use to access our Platform. We may also collect your device identifier, IP address or mobile operating system.
  * **Employment Information.** For example, we may collect your resume, employment history, and references.
  * **Commercial Information**. We may collect personal information that could identify you and relates to the services in which you are interested or have considered. We may also collect personal information about your consuming history or tendencies.
  * **Other Information.** If you use our website, we may collect information about the browser you are using. We might look at what site you came from, or what site you visit when you leave us.


### HOW WE COLLECT YOUR INFORMATION
We collect your information in different ways. Below are some examples of how we may collect your information.
  * **Directly From You.** For example, when you sign up for our mailing list, complete an information inquiry or submit an inquiry to us.
  * For example, when you visit and navigate our Platform on any device. We may also collect information about users over time and across different websites and devices when you use the Platform.
  * **From Third Parties**. We may receive information about you from other sources. For example, this may include receiving information from analytics vendors.
  * **By Combining Information**. For example, we may combine information that we collect offline with information we collect through our Platform. We may also combine information we collect about you from the different devices you use to access our Platform.


### HOW WE USE YOUR INFORMATION
Examples of how we may use your information include:
  * **To Run and Improve Our Platform and Business.** We may use your information to make our Platform and business better. We may also use your information to provide you with information about our business.
  * **To Respond to Your Requests or Questions**. This may include responding to your feedback.
  * **To Communicate With You.** We may communicate with you about our relationship with you. We may also contact you about this Policy or our Platform terms and conditions.
  * **For Marketing Purposes**. We may provide you with information about our company and our business initiatives. For more information about your choices related to these communications, see the Choices section below.
  * **For Security Purposes**. This could include protecting our company and consumers who use our products and services. It may also include protecting our Platform.
  * **As Otherwise Permitted By Law or As We May Notify You**.
  * **As Requested or Directed By You**.


### HOW WE SHARE YOUR INFORMATION
We may share your information in the following ways:
  * We may share your information with our parent, subsidiary, and affiliate entities.
  * **With Our Service Providers.** We may share your information with third parties who perform services on our behalf. For example, this may include companies that send emails on our behalf or help us run our Platform.
  * **With Our Business Partners.** For example, we may also share personal information with social media sites, advertisers, media buying agencies, advertising networks and advertising service providers for the purposes described in this Policy. We may also share personal information with companies that help us learn more about our customers.
  * **With Any Successors to All or Part of Our Business.** For example, if we merge with, are acquired by, or sell part of our business to another entity. This may include an asset sale, corporate reorganization or other change of control.
  * **To Comply With the Law or To Protect Ourselves.** For example, this could include responding to a court order or subpoena. It could also include sharing information if a government agency or investigatory body requests. We might share information when we are investigating a potential fraud.
  * **For Other Reasons We May Describe to You.**
  * **As Requested or Directed By You.**


### CHILDREN UNDER 13
The Platform where this Policy is located is meant for adults. We do not knowingly collect personally identifiable data from persons under the age of 13, and strive to comply with the provisions of COPPA (The Children’s Online Privacy Protection Act). If you are a parent or legal guardian and think your child under 13 has provided us with information, please contact us at compliance@3650capital.com. You can also write to us at the address listed at the end of this website Policy. Please mark your inquiries “COPPA Information Request.” Parents, you can learn more about how to protect children’s privacy on-line [here](https://www.consumer.ftc.gov/articles/0031-protecting-your-childs-privacy-online).
### CHOICES REGARDING YOUR INFORMATION
You have certain choices about how we use your information. Certain choices you make are browser and device specific.
**Marketing Communications:**
You can opt out of receiving our marketing emails. Note that you will still receive transactional messages from us, including information about your use of the Platform and responses to your inquiries.
**Cookies & Other Tracking Technologies:**
  * **Cookies:** You can adjust your browser to control cookies to require your affirmative acceptance for new cookies, automatically reject cookies and/or delete or disable existing cookies. How you do so depends on the type of cookie and the browser that you are using. For more information on how to control browser cookies, [click here](https://www.networkadvertising.org/understanding-online-advertising/what-are-my-options). If information about your browser is not available through this page, please search your browser for instructions about how to opt-out of cookie collection.
  * **Flash Cookies:** You may need to take an additional action to manage flash cookies, which you can learn more about [here](http://www.macromedia.com/support/documentation/en/flashplayer/help/settings_manager07.html). Why? Because flash cookies cannot be controlled through your browser settings.
  * **Google Analytics:** We may use Google Analytics on our Platform to help us understand how you use our Platform. You can learn about how to opt-out of Google Analytics [here](https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout).
  * **Email Tools:** You can also change your email settings to block the automatic download of images in email messages, as such images may contain technologies that help us understand how you interact with the message.
  * Note that deleting or blocking cookies may impact your experience on our website, as some features may not be available. Certain options you select are browser and device specific.


**Our Do Not Track Policy:**
  * **Some browsers have “do not track” features that allow you to tell a website not to track you. These features are not all uniform. We do not currently respond to those signals.** If you block cookies, certain features on our sites may not work. If you block or reject cookies, not all of the tracking described here will stop.
  * Options you select are browser and device specific.


### SECURITY
The Internet is not 100% secure. We cannot promise that your use of our Platform will be completely safe. We encourage you to use caution when using the Internet. We use reasonable means to safeguard personal information under our control. 
### STORAGE OF INFORMATION
Information we maintain may be stored in or outside of the United States. If you live outside of the United States, you understand and agree that we may transfer your personal information to the United States. This Platform is intended for use in the United States and is subject to the laws of the United States, which may not provide the same level of protections as those in your own country.
### LINKS
Our Platform may contain links to other third-party sites that are not governed by this Policy. If you click on a link to a third-party site, you will be taken to a site we do not control. We are not responsible for the privacy practices used by third-party sites. We suggest that you read the privacy policies of those sites carefully. We are not responsible for these third-party sites.
### HOW TO CONTACT US
If you have any questions, comments or concerns with respect to our privacy practices or this Policy, or wish to update your information, please feel free to contact us at compliance@3650capital.com. You may also write to us at the following address:
2977 McFarlane Road, Suite 300
Miami, Florida 33133
Re: 3650 REIT Privacy Policy
### CHANGES IN POLICY
From time to time, we may change our Policy. We will notify you of any material changes to our Policy as required by law. We will also post an updated copy on our Platform. Please check our Platform periodically for updates.
